violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work. Observed employee not washing hands prior to making coffee drinks after washing dishes.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. After multiple cycles sanitizing temperature reached a maximum of 149.6?F.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with dishes.
